overall.description: First-person exploration through a rainy night in a historic Victorian town, likely from Red Dead Redemption 2. The player walks from a garden patio past blooming flower beds and a grand mansion with columns, then onto a cobblestone street where a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The scene features cinematic lighting with warm gas lamps cutting through fog and heavy rain.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rainy night at a garden patio with outdoor furniture under canvas umbrellas. The camera moves forward along a paved path beside a historic wooden building with warm light glowing from windows, passing into a tree-lined garden area.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a landscaped garden with dense vegetation and blooming flower beds visible in the lamplight. The camera continues forward through the rain, moving away from the initial building toward a more open area with garden lamps visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a grand mansion with tall columns and a covered portico, the entrance warmly lit against the rainy night. The path leads through landscaped flower beds as the camera turns to face the impressive facade with its green double doors and upper balcony.

segments.scene_description: The camera backs away from the mansion entrance and turns onto a wet cobblestone street lined with historic buildings and iron fences. The mansion recedes into the background as the view opens to the street scene with warm gas lamps illuminating the rain-slicked stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with gas lamp lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking down the historic cobblestone street lined with warm gas lamps and trees. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, moving through the rainy night as the camera continues forward along the wet, reflective street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a rainy garden patio into the open, atmospheric expanse of a historic cobblestone street. It begins by gliding past outdoor furniture and a wooden building with glowing windows, moving through a tree-lined garden where blooming flower beds are illuminated by soft lamplight. As the camera pushes forward through the rain, the scene opens up to reveal a grand mansion with tall columns and a warmly lit portico. The view then shifts away from the mansion's facade, turning onto a wet cobblestone street lined with iron fences and historic architecture. Finally, the camera advances down the rain-slicked road under the glow of gas lamps as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right.
